raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to strengthen a research passage whose contribution framing, gap statement, and thesis can reasonably be improved above the sentence level.","R1.2":"Making the passage stronger centrally involves checking that the argumentative progression from prior work to method, hypothesis, results, and implication holds together.","R1.3":"Because the artifact makes performance and ablation claims, strengthening it requires ensuring those claims are aligned with the reported evidence.","R1.4":"The passage explicitly positions AgentSift against named prior work and claims strongest-published status, making novelty and delta assessment central.","R1.5":"The excerpt combines background, related work, method, evaluation, and contribution claims, so section-level narrative ordering is part of the expected strengthening.","R1.6":"The plain-language request most directly calls for improving prose force, clarity, concision, and paragraph flow.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty around unverifiable claims and implied empirical strength.","RX.2":"The strong benchmark and practical-tool claims require guarding against overstated conclusions.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection rather than executing the requested strengthening.","RX.4":"Detection methods for identifying synthetic respondents can affect participants and platforms, so downstream-harm sensitivity remains active.","RX.5":"The projection should track which responsibilities arise from the delegation and artifact rather than inventing unsupported tasks."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to strengthen a research passage whose contribution framing, gap statement, and thesis can reasonably be improved above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: Making the passage stronger centrally involves checking that the argumentative progression from prior work to method, hypothesis, results, and implication holds together.
rationale.R1.3: Because the artifact makes performance and ablation claims, strengthening it requires ensuring those claims are aligned with the reported evidence.
rationale.R1.4: The passage explicitly positions AgentSift against named prior work and claims strongest-published status, making novelty and delta assessment central.
rationale.R1.5: The excerpt combines background, related work, method, evaluation, and contribution claims, so section-level narrative ordering is part of the expected strengthening.
rationale.R1.6: The plain-language request most directly calls for improving prose force, clarity, concision, and paragraph flow.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty around unverifiable claims and implied empirical strength.
rationale.RX.2: The strong benchmark and practical-tool claims require guarding against overstated conclusions.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection rather than executing the requested strengthening.
rationale.RX.4: Detection methods for identifying synthetic respondents can affect participants and platforms, so downstream-harm sensitivity remains active.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should track which responsibilities arise from the delegation and artifact rather than inventing unsupported tasks.
